headline: Adobe (ADBE) Launches AI Tools To Help Brands Compete Across Search And Commerce
summary: Adobe, listed as NasdaqGS:ADBE, has introduced Adobe Brand Visibility and new GenStudio features focused on AI-driven marketing and commerce media. The launch brings tools such as prompt analysis, automated brand optimization, and cross channel AI campaign insights to enterprise customers. These offerings are aimed at helping brands manage their visibility across AI search, content surfaces, and commerce media networks. Adobe is expanding its AI toolkit at a time when many marketers are...

headline: Introducing Adobe Brand Visibility: A Unified Solution for the AI Search Era
summary: SAN JOSE, Calif., June 17, 2026--Adobe (Nasdaq:ADBE) — the global technology leader that unleashes creativity, productivity and customer experiences through innovative tools and platforms — today announced Adobe Brand Visibility, a new solution for businesses to ensure their brand is visible, trusted and chosen across AI surfaces. headline: Software Is a Buy Again. That Includes This Beaten-Down Design Stock, Citi Says.
summary: The design-software maker has been battered by fears of artificial intelligence disruption and a broad sector downturn.  As he sees it, the company is just beginning to break into a market where peers like Canva and  Adobe  have already established a foothold.

headline: This Software Stock Is Down 52% in 2026. How AI Could Actually Save It.
summary: The design-software maker has been battered by fears of artificial intelligence disruption and a broad sector downturn.  The design software market faces unique risks, Radke conceded, as generative AI reduces the time and skill required for prototyping and ideation, in turn blurring the boundaries “of who a ‘designer’ is.”  Figma charges on a per-seat basis, factoring in both the total head count and the tier of paid license required to access specific tools.

content.title: This Software Stock Is Down 52% in 2026. How AI Could Actually Save It.
content.summary: The design-software maker has been battered by fears of artificial intelligence disruption and a broad sector downturn.  The design software market faces unique risks, Radke conceded, as generative AI reduces the time and skill required for prototyping and ideation, in turn blurring the boundaries “of who a ‘designer’ is.”  Figma charges on a per-seat basis, factoring in both the total head count and the tier of paid license required to access specific tools.

headline: Jim Cramer on Adobe: “I Don’t Want You in It”
summary: Adobe Inc. (NASDAQ:ADBE) was among Jim Cramer’s stock calls on Mad Money, as he highlighted worthy space players and reviewed several of this year’s IPOs. headline: Pearson Names Certiport 2026 Adobe Certified Professional U.S. National Champion
summary: Pearson (FTSE: PSON.L) announced the winners of the 13th annual Certiport 2026 Adobe Certified Professional U.S. National Championship. Hosted in Nashville, TN, this year's event drew 41 finalists from thousands of students (ages 13–22) across the U.S. who qualified by earning an Adobe Certified Professional certification in Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, or InDesign.

content.title: Pearson Names Certiport 2026 Adobe Certified Professional U.S. National Champion

Figma shares were up 7.8% at $19.38 on Wednesday, snapping an 11-day losing streak.  The design software market faces unique risks, Radke conceded, as generative AI reduces the time and skill required for prototyping and ideation, in turn blurring the boundaries “of who a ‘designer’ is.”

headline: Paycom, Adobe, and Sprinklr Shares Plummet, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks fell in the afternoon session after the Federal Reserve held its benchmark rate at 3.5%–3.75%, unchanged since the central bank cut by three-quarters of a point in late 2025, and then delivered a dot plot that told investors the easing cycle underpinning the sector's re-rating might be over.
